page_metadata.biotools__summary: BinMat offers users of fragment analysis methods an efficient and easy-to-use platform to process their binary data matrices, by means of either a graphical user interface or an R package.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BinMat offers users of fragment analysis methods an efficient and easy-to-use platform to process their binary data matrices, by means of either a graphical user interface or an R package.
